articles.author: Edna Mohamed
articles.title: India signs critical minerals deal with Brazil to curb dependance on China - Al Jazeera
articles.description: Brazilian President Lula called the critical minerals and rare earths deal the ‘core of the pioneering agreement’.
articles.content:
Brazil and India have signed an agreement to boost cooperation on critical minerals and rare earths, as the Indian government seeks new suppliers to curb its dependence on China.

articles.content:
